reasoning: Fix commit 330af381 is "Remove the lightning app code (#20039)", a mass deletion of the whole app; serialize is one of 1307 generic functions swept up, unrelated to the upload_file path-traversal root cause.

__init__ only appears as git's hunk-header context in audio.py/image.py; the actual fix (wrapping torch.load in check_sparse_tensor_invariants) is in load_bytes/load_file/load_prompt_embeds, so __init__ is a false positive.
Small newly-added helper that trims the ownerDisplaySecret string; the core fix is resolveOwnerDisplaySetting/ensureOwnerDisplaySecret decoupling the secret, not this trimming helper.
Newly added in fix commit eb60e2e1 as a hardening follow-up to tighten ps token matching; the core fix is the ppid-ownership check in commit 6084d13b, so this is secondary.
The vulnerable `reqOperation === 'search-type'` short-circuit that granted over-broad scope was removed directly inside this function, fixing the improper permission check.
filestring() was directly rewritten to add allowed_dir sandboxing, realpath resolution, and traversal/symlink checks — the core arbitrary-file-read fix.
The URL-decode-before-matching fix (sanitizeUrlPath) was inserted directly inside the middie() engine function, closing the path-prefix bypass.
_read() was directly patched to drop the externally-controlled .format() URL construction in favor of urljoin/f-string, fixing the format-string vulnerability.
main() was directly patched to basename-sanitize attachment filenames and resolve() the output paths, fixing the path traversal.
Insecure tempfile.mktemp() was replaced with mkstemp() directly inside this function — the core fix.
check_blocked_users was newly added in the fix to enforce hosted_domain against the Google `hd` claim (rejecting spoofed email-domain accounts) — the core authorization fix.
This function was not modified; it only appears as git's hunk-header context. The real fix (project_only=True) is in the adjacent _network_get_query, so extracting this name is a false positive.

Collapse.getParent was modified in the same bundled fix commit (jQuery selector hardening) but that change fixes CVE-2018-14040 (data-parent XSS); this advisory is CVE-2018-14042 (tooltip data-container XSS), so Collapse is not the core fix here.

generate_id_token was updated to encode with JsonWebToken([alg]) instead of the global jwt, but the root-cause fix is removing "none" from the default jwt instance in jose/__init__.py; this is a secondary call-site update.

Newly added factory that wires the onRequestAuthenticated release hook; supports the fix but the core concurrency-limiting logic lives in beginWebhookRequestPipelineOrReject/createWebhookInFlightLimiter.
check_user_active is the newly-added before_request hook that logs out deactivated users — the direct fix for the vuln allowing deactivated users to keep using the UI/API.

The function does not appear anywhere in fix commit 1a483ebb, which is a bulk jstree library replacement that deletes the vulnerable clipboard.swf; _create_default is a false positive from a 51-function low-confidence extraction.
readKey was directly modified to replace read().toString() with asSafeString(read()), stopping the recursive property-name conversion that caused infinite recursion (CWE-674).
parse_index_server was directly rewritten to drop the catastrophic-backtracking URL_REGEX in favor of a simple re.split — the core ReDoS fix.
same_origin (the added websocket Origin/Host check, evolved from check_origin/is_cross_origin in the PR) is the direct fix for missing websocket origin validation.
Same mass-deletion commit (330af381, "Remove the lightning app code"); __DummyBase is a generic base-class placeholder incidentally removed, not the vulnerable upload handler.
body() was directly patched to wrap value/name in html.escape(), fixing the waterfall XSS.
editor_chart_run was directly modified to add parameter validation and block dangerous SQL/file operations — the core fix for the arbitrary-file-write/SQL-injection endpoint.
do_items was not modified; it only appears as git's hunk-header context. The real fix (the _attr_key_re check) lives in do_xmlattr, so extracting do_items is a false positive.
isAllowHost is the newly-added allowlist host-validation helper introduced by the "refine --allowOrigin" CSRF fix; it directly implements the origin allowlist check that prevents origin reflection.
reset_user_sessions is the newly-added method that invalidates a user's DB sessions on password reset — the direct fix for the session-fixation vuln.

This function does not appear anywhere in the sqrt multiple-eval fix (PR 3976), which modifies _build_adhoc_slice_node, _build_create_IR and Sqrt.build_IR; a 31-function low-confidence false positive.
raise_standardErrorMessage was directly patched to xml_escape(str(error_message)), fixing the error-message XSS.

sign_all was not modified; it only appears as git's hunk-header context. The actual fix (yaml.load -> yaml.safe_load) is in the adjacent load_yaml function, so extracting sign_all is a false positive.
sanitizeHtml was directly modified to add 'noscript' to disallowedTags — the direct fix for the NOSCRIPT-tag XSS.

The datetime() helper was not modified; it only appears as git's hunk-header context in timezone.py. The real fix (strict date parsing) is in parse()/_safe_parse_datetime and view methods, so datetime is a false positive.

toMcpStringRecord was renamed to toMcpFilteredStringRecord and given a generic shouldDropKey hook to support filtering; the actual env-denylist security policy lives in the new toMcpEnvRecord, so this is supporting infrastructure rather than the core fix.

_try_fetch_manifest was modified in PR 728 but for the bundled SSRF anti-rebind DNS-pin hardening (R-5/F-SSRF1), not the cross-tenant quarantine BOLA this advisory describes (fixed via tenant_id predicates in quarantine.py); secondary to the core fix.
The vulnerable fallback block (a curl command interpolating window.location.href via document.write) was removed directly from inside ApolloServerPluginLandingPageDefault, eliminating the XSS vector.
doubleQuoteIfNeeded is a newly-added quoting helper in the Windows command-injection fix, secondary to the primary metacharacter-escaping helper escapeCmdArgs that is the core defense.

Fix commit for this RCE is the same 330af381 "Remove the lightning app code (#20039)" mass deletion; __post_init__ is a generic dataclass hook swept up in the 1307-function removal, not a targeted patch of the deepdiff Delta deserializer.

get_absolute_path is a newly-added classmethod override that runs is_unsafe_path_pattern() validation before super().get_absolute_path(), blocking malicious UNC/drive paths ahead of os.path.realpath() — the core SSRF/NTLM-leak fix.
get_environment was directly modified to mask hidden parameters with '******' before returning the environment — the core fix for the hidden-parameter information leak.
Same mass-deletion fix commit (330af381); "changes" is one of 1307 generic functions removed wholesale, not the targeted root-cause fix for the deepdiff Delta RCE.

The signature-verification bug (this.verify(...) always truthy) was fixed by adding .verified directly inside the tEnvoyNaClSigningKey constructor function's verifyWithMessage method — the core cryptographic fix.
_build_redirect_request was directly rewritten to drop the Authorization header on scheme/port changes (not just domain), fixing the same-domain cross-origin auth-header leak.
_parse_returned_data was directly modified to strip magic/connection/interpreter variables from returned ansible_facts — the core fact-sanitization fix for the RCE.

ensure_docker_access is a bash helper in a newly-added start-local-secure.sh startup script; the actual Python sandbox-escape RCE fix is in the compiler service/routes, so this dev-startup function is a false positive.

resolve_default_branch was directly patched to insert the `--` end-of-options separator before the user-controlled git_url in the git ls-remote call, blocking the argument/option-injection code execution.

_handleAddress's signature was updated to accept and pass a depth counter down the recursive call stack; the actual DoS depth-limit check lives in addressparser, so this is a pass-the-parameter change, not the core fix.

The SAFE_FOR_XML rawtext-element fix (adding textarea/style/title/xmp handling) is implemented directly inside the createDOMPurify factory that constitutes the library, addressing the root-cause attribute-sanitization bypass.

finalize_options (a setuptools build command) was modified to bundle the replacement sanitizer; the core XSS fix is the security.js swap from google-caja to the jupyterlab sanitizer, so this is build-support, secondary.

_getValueLength was not modified; it only appears as git's hunk-header context. The signature-forgery fix is in asn1.fromDer (parseAllBytes) and key.verify (digestInfoValidator) in rsa.js, so this is a false positive.
_validate_model_inputs is the newly-added method that raises ValueError on an empty prompt, directly fixing the empty-prompt server-crash DoS.

The signature-wrapping fix (using getSignedReferences() for the cryptographically authenticated node and migrating to xml-crypto v6) is implemented directly inside the libSaml factory's verifySignature — the core fix.
The file appenders' configure() functions were directly modified to default file mode to 0o600 instead of world-readable 0o644 — the core incorrect-default-permissions fix.
AuthLocker is the newly-added mutex class wrapping login() to serialize simultaneous LDAP auth attempts, directly fixing the session-mixup race condition.

count_parameters (a model-parameter counter) is unrelated to and absent from the ReDoS fix, which is a regex change in get_imports() in dynamic_module_utils.py; a 649-function low-confidence false positive.

"promise" is a generic local variable (an async IIFE) inside the newly-added getPinnedAgents method, not a named function; extracting it is a variable-name mis-extraction. The proper SSRF-fix function is getPinnedAgents.

shallowEqual is a caching helper added in the TypeScript rewrite that fixed the sandbox bypass; it supports isConstant's memoization but is not the core AST-evaluation/method-allowlist fix (canCallMethod/expressionToConstant).
